fee.description: Fee from calculate order response for all order types

quantity.description: Order quantity or number of shares. NB: Fractional shares not allowed for LIMT and STOP Orders.

total_price.description: Order price returned from the calculate order response

price.description: Price per share from the calculate order response. Used for only LIMIT and STOP Orders

price_per_share.description: Price per share from the calculate order response

sell_all.description: set to true if the user is trying to sell_all the shares they have for that particular stock.

expiration.description: Used to set expiration date for `LIMIT` or `STOP` orders
expiration.default: 90 Days if no date is set

extended_hours_order.description: Set to true if the user wants their trade executed during extended hours. This only supports LIMIT orders and whole unit trading during extended hours.
